season.packing_es: Ropa ligera de lino, protector solar, sombrero, botella reutilizable, repelente (6-8pm), capa ligera para A/C y paraguas compacto.
season.packing_en: Light linen clothes, sunscreen, hat, reusable water bottle, insect repellent (6-8pm), a light layer for A/C and a compact umbrella.

currency.tipping_es: ~10% propina voluntaria en restaurantes ('¿servicio incluido?'). No acostumbrado en vendedores ambulantes.
currency.tipping_en: ~10% voluntary tip at restaurants ('¿servicio incluido?'). Not customary for street vendors.
